ここの市場は、いつ来ても活気に満ちていますね！<br>良い“陽”の気が渦巻いてい:
This market is always so lively whenever I visit! The wonderful 'yang'
energy is swirling all around!
実は、皆さんの健康を願って“薬膳恵方巻”をたくさん作ろうかと……。<br>陰陽五:
I plan to make medicinal fortune rolls for everyone's health. Using
yin-yang and the five elements, they'll invigorate you from within.
ですが……私の故郷のものとは食材を代えないと難しいかもですね～<br>“かつお菜:
It might be hard to find substitutes for my hometown ingredients.
They don't sell local greens or conger eel here.
あっ、この赤い実は“火”の気を感じますね。<br>酢飯に混ぜると、気の巡りがよく:
Oh, I can feel fiery energy from these red berries. If I mix them into
the sushi rice, it seems the energy flow will improve.
ふふふっ、なんだか食材探しも楽しいですねっ！<br>美味しい恵方巻に仕上げますの:
Fufufu, somehow searching for ingredients is quite fun! I'll make it
into delicious fortune rolls, so please look forward to it!♪
